feed.title: Dynamic Brain & Memory Lab
feed.subtitle: The official website of the Brain & Memory Lab at the National University of Singapore (NUS), led by Principal Investigator Dr. Jia-Hou Poh.

entry.title: [NUS Medicine Press Release] Not all memories are created equal: Study by NUS and Duke shows how motivation shapes our memory

link.title: [NUS Medicine Press Release] Not all memories are created equal: Study by NUS and Duke shows how motivation shapes our memory

entry.content:
We are excited to share about our recent press release with NUS Medicine!

Check out the full press release: Not all memories are created equal: Study by NUS and Duke shows how motivation shapes our memory.
entry.summary: We are excited to share about our recent press release with NUS Medicine!

entry.title: [PsyPost Feature] Motivation acts as a camera lens that shapes how memories form

link.title: [PsyPost Feature] Motivation acts as a camera lens that shapes how memories form

entry.content:
Check out PsyPost's recent coverage, Motivation acts as a camera lens that shapes how memories form, of our previous work.

Thank you Karina for your comprehensive report!
entry.summary: Check out PsyPost's recent coverage, Motivation acts as a camera lens that shapes how memories form, of our previous work. Thank you Karina for your comprehensive report!

entry.title: [Publication] Read Natasha’s paper on dysfunctional brain states & delirium

link.title: [Publication] Read Natasha’s paper on dysfunctional brain states & delirium

entry.content:
Congratulations to Natasha on her latest publication, Dysfunctional resting state network connectivity predicts postoperative delirium after major surgery.

Read more about how atypical RSFC is associated with increased risk of post-surgery delirium on the British Journal of Anaesthesia.
entry.summary: Congratulations to Natasha on her latest publication, Dysfunctional resting state network connectivity predicts postoperative delirium after major surgery.

entry.title: [Publication] Read our review paper on the Annual Reviews of Psychology!

link.title: [Publication] Read our review paper on the Annual Reviews of Psychology!

entry.content:
How do motivational states engender distinct neural contexts for adaptive memory? Check out our latest publication, "Motivation as Neural Context for Adaptive Learning and Memory Formation", on the Annual Reviews of Psychology.

Congrats to the team that worked on this!
entry.summary: How do motivational states engender distinct neural contexts for adaptive memory? Check out our latest publication, "Motivation as Neural Context for Adaptive Learning and Memory Formation", on the Annual Reviews of Psychology.

entry.title: The dynamic brain and memory lab is live!

link.title: The dynamic brain and memory lab is live!
